faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about joining Revillion Partners affiliate network

q1.question: What are the commission rates?
q1.answer: We offer industry-leading CPA commissions ranging from $50 to $220 per First-Time Deposit, depending on the GEO market and casino brand. Additional RevShare and hybrid deals are available for top performers. All rates are transparent with no hidden fees or deductions.

q2.question: When do I get paid?
q2.answer: Payments are processed monthly, typically by the 15th of each month. We support multiple payment methods including bank transfer, Skrill, Neteller, and cryptocurrency. Minimum payout threshold is $100. All earnings are tracked in real-time via our dashboard.

q3.question: What markets do you operate in?
q3.answer: We operate in 40+ global markets including UK, Germany, Canada, Brazil, India, and many more. Each market has localized offers, payment methods, and language support to maximize your conversion rates. Our affiliate managers can recommend the best GEOs for your traffic.

q4.question: What tools and support do you provide?
q4.answer: You get access to professional banners, landing pages, email templates, smart short URLs with GEO-targeting, instant postback system, real-time analytics dashboard, and dedicated affiliate managers who help optimize your campaigns. We also provide marketing materials optimized for social media platforms.

q5.question: Is there a signup fee?
q5.answer: No, joining Revillion Partners is completely free. There are no signup fees, hidden costs, or minimum traffic requirements. You only earn when you generate conversions. We welcome affiliates of all experience levels and provide comprehensive onboarding support.
